channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead baby fox, 30th May
item.description:
Noted a fox that is dead and is a pup

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Imperial Place, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish, 30th May
item.description:
Fly tipped, here for over 4 days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frances Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Washing machine left on pavement on Royal Oak Road, 30th May
item.description:
The washing machine has been dumped on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Oak Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dropped kerb left too high, 30th May
item.description:
Brampton Road was resurfaced. Since this the ramp for 253 and 255 is considerably higher than before and all the others. Ashley Gillam, site manager gave me his details for them to resolve but this has not happened. This high ‘dropped kerb’ will cause damage to all our vehicles using this due to the noise it makes despite going incredibly slow. The other dropped kerbs before and still on Brampton are either level or very slightly raised nothing like ours. The ramp is approximately an inch high. Please arrange for this to be fixed. Either myself or my neighbour at 253 can be contacted about complaint

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brampton Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Office chair dumped next to bin near entrance to oark, 30th May
item.description:
Office chair dumped next to bin near entrance to oark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Surrey Canal Walk, Peckham, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Trees need trimming at base, 30th May
item.description:
Some trees on Hillsborough Road need the bases trimmed as the branches are blocking the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Hillsboro Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping a again, 30th May
item.description:
To day at 10 :50 ish outside side of the wheat sheaf hall again two bag of rubbish in the corner and one still on the railing from this Thursday just gone is still on the railing s with the new dumped rubbish when is Enfield council going to clean this up the rubbish bag in the corner is stinking to high haven

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Main Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Branches too low. Crown requires raising. People having to duck to walk on pavement, 30th May
item.description:
Bottom branches need removing to raise the height of the tree crown. People are walking into branches or having to duck. Hazard for those visually impaired

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warren Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
